Off Calendar Jan-07-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF ANTONIO JORDAN, IN HIS REPRESENTATIVE CAPACITY ON BEHALF OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AND FELLOW AGGRIEVED EMPLOYEES' Motion To Dismiss Entire Action.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as modified:

Motion is unopposed. Individual PAGA claims are dismissed with prejudice. Representative PAGA claims are dismissed without prejudice.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Barbara A. Zuniga; Clerk: V. da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/BAZ)
